title: Table 1 in Integrative description of Paramacrobiotus bengalensis sp. nov. (Tardigrada: Eutardigrada: Macrobiotidae), a new limno-terrestrial tardigrade species from the state of West Bengal, India
author: Basu, Subhrangshu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Table 1.  PCR primers for amplification of the four DNA fragments sequenced in the study.      DNA Fragment    Primer Name    Primer direction    Primer sequence    Primer source         18S_Tar_1Ff  Forward  AGGCGAAACCGCGAATGGCTC  Stec  et al.     18S rRNA        (2017)      18S_Tar_1Rr  Reverse  GCCGCAGGCTCCACTCCTGG        28SF0001  Forward  ACCCVCYNAATTTAAGCATAT  Mironov  et al.     28s rRNA        (2012)    (amplification failed)  28SR0990  Reverse  CCTTGGTCCGTGTTTCAAGAC        ITS3  Forward  GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC  White  et al.     ITS2        (1990)    (amplification failed)  ITS4  Reverse  TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC        LCO1490  Forward  GGTCAACAAATCATAAAGATATTGG  Folmer  et al.  (1994)    COI  HCO2198  Reverse  TAAACTTCAGGGTGACCAAAAAATCA        HCOoutout  Reverse  GTAAATATATGRTGDGCTC  Prendini  et al.  (2005)
